REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED AS FOLLOWS: (1) DEMURRER TO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR WRONGFUL FORECLOSURE IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS NO STANDING TO CHALLENGE DEFENDANT'S AUTHORITY TO FORECLOSE PRE-FORECLOSURE; ALSO SEE AVILA V. WELLS FARGO 2016 WL 7425925 AND HERRERA V. FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION (2012) 205 CAL. APP. 4TH 1495; (2) DEMURRER TO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR QUIET TITLE TILE IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO MERS AS NO ADVERSE CLAIM TO TITLE IS ALLEGED; DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO OTHER DEFENDANTS FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE IN GOOD FAITH BASIS FOR CLAIM IN LIGHT OF AVILA AND HERRERA; TO ALLEGE TENDER OR ALLEGE FACTS SHOWING THAT NOTE AND DOT ARE VOID; (3) DEMURRER TO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR UNJUST ENRICHMENT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE IN GOOD FAITH A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR RESTITUTION IN LIGHT OF AVILA AND HERRERA; AND TO ALLEGE PAYMENTS MADE TO DEFENDANTS; (4) DEMURRER TO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR UCL VIOLATION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED (D501)

calendar.matters:
Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-24-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that the authority of foreclosing entity may be challenged pre-foreclosure. Yvanova stands for the proposition that such standing exists after foreclosure. Yvanova v. New Century Mortg. Corp. (2016) 62 Cal.4th 919. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)

MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Court'S Order Sustaining Demurrer To First Amended Complaint Without Leave To Amend
Off Calendar Aug-07-2017 Continued To Aug-24-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SONG KOCHAPHUM and PHAEW BUNCHAN's Motion To Set Aside Court'S Order Sustaining Demurrer To First Amended Complaint Without Leave To Amend is GRANTED. Demurrer hearing is re-set for August 24, 2017. Plaintiff is ordered to file and serve opposition to demurrer no later than August 8, 2017. Plaintiff shall provide courtesy copy of the opposition, previously filed demurrer and the operative complaint no later than August 8, 2017 by 4:00 p.m. Defendant shall have until August 18, 2017 to file a reply, if any. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)

Off Calendar Jun-29-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Megan C. Kelly (415-398-3344) of Severson & Werson for Defendants/Moving party NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., and U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., and U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.)
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2017 Continued To Jul-05-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Megan Kelly (415-677-5679) of Severson & Werson for Defendants/Moving party NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION.
No other appearances.

Not ARGUED. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED as follows: (1) Demurrer to cause of action for wrongful foreclosure is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff has no standing to challenge Defendant's authority to foreclose pre-foreclosure; also see Avila v. Wells Fargo 2016 WL 7425925 and Herrera v. Federal National Mortgage Association (2012) 205 Cal. App. 4th 1495; (2) Demurrer to cause of action for quiet title tile is sustained without leave to amend as to MERS as no adverse claim to title is alleged; demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to other Defendants for Plaintiff to allege in good faith basis for claim in light of Avila and Herrera; to allege tender or allege facts showing that Note and DOT are void; (3) demurrer to cause of action for unjust enrichment is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith a cause of action for restitution in light of Avila and Herrera; and to allege payments made to defendants; (4) demurrer to cause of action for UCL violation is sustained with leave to amend. Order signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details) Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)

Osc: Re Preliminary Injuction
Off Calendar Jan-31-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark W. Lapham (925-837-9007) for Plaintiff Song Kochaphum.
Megsn Kelly (415-677-5679) of Severson & Werson for Defendant Nationstar Mortgage, LLC.

The Court announces the Tentative Ruling. Hearing is held. Argued re: pre and post. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Osc: Re Preliminary Injuction is DENIED. Plaintiffs failed to show likelihood of prevailing on the merits on any of their claims. See White v. Davis (2003) 30 Cal.4th 528 and Hunt v. Sup. Ct. (1999) 21 Cal.4th 984. Order, approved as to form, is signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
